title: Twisha Sharma death: Madhya Pradesh High Court orders second post-mortem by AIIMS Delhi
description: The Madhya Pradesh on Friday directed that a second post-mortem of Twisha Sharma, who recently died under mysterious circumstances at her matrimonial home in Bhopal, be conducted by a team of doctors from All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi.However, Justice Avanindra Kumar Singh said the post-mortem will be conducted in Bhopal. A special flight will be arranged for doctors.This has to done at the earliest, the Bench said. The order was passed on a petition moved by Twisha Sharma's
